articles.title: Toronto step closer to 'much needed' Liberty Village traffic and community additions
articles.summary: The City of Toronto has voted on plans to update Liberty Village's infrastructure, including a new community center, Canada Post service and school development.

articles.title: Female pedestrian struck by vehicle in Scarborough
articles.summary: A female pedestrian has been struck by a vehicle in Scarborough Monday night. Toronto police were called to Markham Road and Highway 401 just before 9:30 p.m. for reports of a collision. She was rushed to hospital with serious, life-threatening injuries. The northbound lanes of Markham Road were closed at Progress Avenue for an investigation. […]

articles.title: Four suspects wanted for allegedly breaking into Annex home several times
articles.summary: Toronto police are searching for four suspects who allegedly broke into home in The Annex several times over two days. Officers were called to the home in the area of Spadina Road and Dupont Street on June 18 for reports of a break and enter. It’s alleged several suspect broke into the home at some […]

articles.title: Brampton MPP accused of using public funds for ads in family newspaper, integrity commissioner reviewing
articles.summary: Ontario's integrity commissioner is reviewing allegations that a Brampton MPP used taxpayer dollars to purchase ads in a newspaper run by an immediate family member.

articles.title: Toronto man and Ajax woman charged in human trafficking investigation
articles.summary: Toronto police have made two arrests connected to a human trafficking investigation that began in March in Toronto and Ajax involving a 27-year-old victim. Police allege the two accused trafficked the victim through a combination of deception, coercion and control. It is also alleged that the victim was taken to different locations to meet clients […]

articles.title: Suspect arrested in 2023 shooting of security guard at Pickering casino, police say
articles.summary: A suspect has been arrested outside of Ontario in connection with the fatal shooting of Pickering casino security guard nearly three years ago, police say.

articles.title: Suspects arrested after allegedly trying to steal shopping carts full of power tools: York police
articles.summary: Four suspects are facing charges and a fifth remains at large after they allegedly tried to steal shopping carts full of power tools from a store in Markham, York Regional Police (YRP) report. Officers were called to a store in the Fairburn Drive and Highway 7 area on Sunday, July 19 at around 7:45 p.m. […]

articles.title: Police looking for suspect who allegedly exposed himself in 2 separate Markham incidents
articles.summary: York Regional Police (YRP) investigators are asking the public for help in identifying a suspect who allegedly committed two indecent acts in Markham on Friday and Saturday. Police say a person was walking in the area of Hillcroft Drive and Gillingham Avenue at around 1:20 a.m. on Friday when the suspect, naked from the waist […]

articles.title: 2 injured after loose tire falls off vehicle, hitting SUV, on Hwy. 401 in Clarington
articles.summary: A section of Highway 401 in Clarington remains closed after a loose tire came off a vehicle and struck an SUV. Ontario Provincial Police (OPP) officers were called to a stretch of the highway near Newtonville Road just after 11:30 a.m. on Monday. Police say a vehicle was travelling east when it lost one of […]

articles.title: Loose wheel strikes vehicle on Highway 401 in Clarington, woman seriously hurt: OPP
articles.summary: A driver has been charged after a loose wheel bounced across Highway 401 and struck another vehicle in Clarington, Ont., injuring two, police say.

articles.title: Suspect arrested in fatal shooting at Pickering casino in 2023
articles.summary: Investigators with Durham Regional Police Service (DRPS) say they have made an arrest in connection with the fatal shooting of a security guard at Pickering Casino Resort nearly three years ago. Officers were called to the entertainment complex around 5 a.m. Oct. 9, 2023. A man, who police have since identified as 24-year-old Michael Ferdinand, […]

articles.title: Woman, 91, dead following 2-vehicle collision in Scarborough last week: Toronto police
articles.summary: Toronto police say a 91-year-old woman is dead following a two-vehicle collision in Scarborough last Monday.

articles.title: Toronto's Hope House offers women path out of homelessness. But the city's far from supportive housing goal
articles.summary: A year after St. Felix Centre in downtown Toronto opened Hope House, the rent-geared-to-income supportive housing residence says it's making a difference in the lives of women and children experiencing housing instability, and domestic violence. It's part of the city's plan to create more affordable and long-term housing solutions, as many people are still being turned away from shelters every mon
